creator: bayartb@edgard.fdn.fr
text:
"Mon ami Tim Vanderhoek m'a dit:"
> 
> On Fri, May 21, 1999 at 03:13:08PM -0400, Benjamin BAYART wrote:
> > "Mon ami Tim Vanderhoek m'a dit:"
> > 
> > > Out of curiousity, why would one want to recursively create checksums
> > > in a port hierarchy?
> > 
> > When one automatically generates 450 ports :-)
> 
> Ok, fair enough.  Now my curiousity is piqued, however.  Why would one
> automatically generate 450 ports?  :-)

Well, I made a distribution of TeX, available as RPMs for linux, and I
would like it to be also available as ports for FreBSD, as .tar.gz for
HP-Ux, as... This distribution can be found at
ftp://ftp.lip6.fr/pub/TeX/FDNTeX
The FreeBSD version will be available soon (few days).

Regards,

       Benjamin.
